systems.name: Shahab-3
systems.notes: Liquid-fueled MRBM. Can reach all of Israel, most of Saudi Arabia, all Gulf states.

systems.name: Fattah
systems.notes: Iran's claimed hypersonic missile. Mach 13-15 terminal velocity. Used against Ali Al Salem, Kuwait. Penetrated Patriot defenses.

systems.name: Kheibar Shekan
systems.notes: Solid-fueled for rapid launch. Maneuverable reentry vehicle. Used against Haifa.

systems.name: Emad
systems.notes: Guided reentry vehicle variant of Shahab-3. Improved accuracy.

systems.name: Sejjil
systems.notes: Longest-range confirmed Iranian missile. Solid-fueled, two-stage. Can reach southeastern Europe.
